# Cache eviction

## Intent

Evict the least-recently-used entry when full.

## Non-goals

- Not persistence.

## Requirements

### AC-001 — evicts LRU when full

When the cache is full, an insert must evict the least-recently-used entry.

Verify with: `npm test -- cache`

## Open questions

- None (non-blocking).

## Affected areas

- `src/cache/store.ts`
- `src/cache/lru.ts`
